## Instructions

- Do not generate documentation, README files, or explanatory docs unless explicitly requested
- Focus on providing code, solutions, and direct answers
- Keep responses concise and actionable
- Only create documentation when the user specifically asks for it

## Examples of what NOT to do automatically:

- Creating README.md files
- Writing extensive code comments or documentation
- Generating API documentation
- Creating user guides or tutorials

## Examples of what TO do:

- Provide working code solutions
- Give direct answers to questions
- Offer configuration examples
- Share relevant code snippets
